originalTitle: US oil producers increase output to capture price surge from Iran war
summary: Drilling expansion follows 40 per cent jump in cost from global supply crunch that has dented president’s approval ratings

chineseTitle: 美国石油生产商增加产量以应对伊朗战争造成的价格飙升

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
